name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BACKLOG-11
title: Restyle tdd-step.py [rabbit] output to [🐇 rabbit 🐇] 🔧 ━━━ ... ━━━ 🔧 format with CAPS state names
description: tdd-step.py prints [rabbit] lines directly to stdout/stderr using _rbt_ok/_rbt_alert helpers. Restyle to match the new [🐇 rabbit 🐇] ICON ━━━ MSG ━━━ ICON format. Changes: (1) _rbt_ok format: '[🐇 rabbit 🐇] 🔧 ━━━ MSG ━━━ 🔧' green. (2) _rbt_alert format: '[🐇 rabbit 🐇] 🔧 ━━━ MSG ━━━ 🔧' red. (3) All state names in transition output uppercased (e.g. SPEC-READ -> TEST-RED). Companion to RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-19.
